title: Oppenheimer
synopsis: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.

title: Dune: Part Two
synopsis: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family.

title: Interstellar
synopsis: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: The Dark Knight
synopsis: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who plunges Gotham into chaos.

title: Inception
synopsis: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is tasked with planting an idea in a CEO's mind.

title: The Godfather
synopsis: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

title: Pulp Fiction
synopsis: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: Spirited Away
synopsis: A ten-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches and spirits, where humans are changed into beasts.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
synopsis: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: Joker
synopsis: In Gotham City, mentally troubled comedian Arthur Fleck embarks on a downward spiral that transforms him into the Joker.

title: Your Name
synopsis: Two strangers find themselves linked through dreams in a bizarre way, and must work together to bridge space and time.

title: Coco
synopsis: Aspiring musician Miguel enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather, a legendary singer.

title: Whiplash
synopsis: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams are mentored by a ruthless instructor.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
synopsis: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator, training a new generation for a specialized mission.

title: Barbie
synopsis: Barbie suffers a crisis that leads her to question her world and her existence.
